template_data.lead_html: The fear hiding behind "is this worth it?"

rows.what_html: "How long does it take?" — what they ask to open the call
"What if we never win anything?" — what they actually mean
The Schedule is infrastructure — what you build on it is the work

template_data.closer: THE DOOR OPENS. YOU STILL HAVE TO WALK THROUGH.
template_data.image_prompt: Infographic story layout. Warm forest-green and amber palette, cream background. Left side: illustrated professional man in business casual, sitting at desk on a phone call, looking engaged and curious, warm amber desk lamp light. Right side: three-row conversation arc timeline with small icons — row 1 label 'THE FIRST QUESTION' with speech bubble icon, row 2 label 'THE REAL QUESTION' with lightbulb icon, row 3 label 'THE REAL ANSWER' with open-door icon. Each row has a 2-3 word callout in forest green. Bold headline top: 'THE FEAR BEHIND THE QUESTION'. One highlighted callout box in amber: 'THE DOOR OPENS'. Footer text: 'William Hill · GSA Focus'.
